capabilities.name: ArchiveHook
capabilities.description: Lightweight async hook for triggering history archiving.

methods.name: __init__
methods.doc: Initialize the ArchiveHook.

methods.name: is_enabled
methods.doc: Check if archiving is enabled.

methods.name: disable
methods.doc: Disable archiving (for testing or migration).

methods.name: enable
methods.doc: Enable archiving.

methods.name: get_pending_task_count
methods.doc: Get the count of pending (not yet completed) tasks.

methods.name: get_pending_task_ids
methods.doc: Get list of pending task identifiers.

methods.name: _create_task_with_tracking
methods.doc: Create an async task with tracking and automatic cleanup.

methods.name: _done_callback
methods.doc: Clean up task reference when completed.

methods.name: trigger_run_archive
methods.doc: Trigger async archiving of a runtime run.

methods.name: trigger_task_snapshot_archive
methods.doc: Trigger async archiving of a task snapshot.

methods.name: trigger_factory_archive
methods.doc: Trigger async archiving of a factory run.

capabilities.name: get_archive_hook
capabilities.description: Get or create the global archive hook.

capabilities.name: create_archive_hook
capabilities.description: Create a new archive hook (for testing or isolated use).

capabilities.name: ArchiveManifest
capabilities.description: Archive manifest - metadata for an archived run/snapshot.

capabilities.name: HistoryRunIndex
capabilities.description: Entry in the runs index file.

capabilities.name: HistoryArchiveService
capabilities.description: Service for archiving runtime data to workspace/<metadata_dir>/history.

methods.name: archive_run
methods.doc: Archive a runtime run to history.

methods.name: archive_task_snapshot
methods.doc: Archive a task snapshot to history.

methods.name: archive_factory_run
methods.doc: Archive a factory run to history.

methods.name: list_history_runs
methods.doc: List archived runs from history index.

methods.name: get_manifest
methods.doc: Get manifest for an archived run/snapshot.

methods.name: get_run_events
methods.doc: Get events for an archived run (auto-decompresses .zst).

methods.name: _collect_run_files
methods.doc: Collect all files in a run directory (relative paths).

methods.name: _copy_directory
methods.doc: Copy directory recursively using atomic operation (temp + replace).

methods.name: _compress_run_events
methods.doc: Compress event files in a run directory.

methods.name: _calculate_checksums
methods.doc: Calculate total size, file count, and content hash.

methods.name: _append_to_index
methods.doc: Append an entry to an index file using atomic write.

methods.name: _create_empty_manifest
methods.doc: Create an empty manifest for non-existent sources.

capabilities.name: create_history_archive_service
capabilities.description: Factory function to create a HistoryArchiveService.

capabilities.name: HistoryManifestRepository
capabilities.description: Repository for managing history index files.

methods.name: __init__
methods.doc: Initialize the repository.

methods.name: _get_index_path
methods.doc: Get the path for an index file.

methods.name: _atomic_write
methods.doc: Append an entry to an index file with TOCTOU-safe serialization.

methods.name: append_run_entry
methods.doc: Append a run entry to the runs index.

methods.name: append_task_entry
methods.doc: Append a task entry to the tasks index.

methods.name: append_factory_entry
methods.doc: Append a factory entry to the factory index.

methods.name: read_runs_index
methods.doc: Read entries from the runs index.

methods.name: read_tasks_index
methods.doc: Read entries from the tasks index.

methods.name: read_factory_index
methods.doc: Read entries from the factory index.

methods.name: _read_index
methods.doc: Generic index reader.

methods.name: get_run_entry
methods.doc: Get a specific run entry by ID.

methods.name: get_task_entry
methods.doc: Get a specific task entry by snapshot ID.

methods.name: get_factory_entry
methods.doc: Get a specific factory entry by ID.

methods.name: count_entries
methods.doc: Count entries in an index.

methods.name: clear_index
methods.doc: Clear all entries from an index.

methods.name: list_indices
methods.doc: List all indices and their entry counts.

capabilities.name: create_history_manifest_repository
capabilities.description: Factory function to create a HistoryManifestRepository.
